Sir Edward Leigh MP

Welcome to my website. I am the Conservative Member of Parliament for the Gainsborough constituency.

Here you can read my most recent news and find out about my work as an MP, whether in Parliament or in the constituency. I am here to help everyone of the inhabitants of the Gainsborough constituency. I am at your service!

Featured Story

A very successful first board meeting of Pride in Place!

24th April 2026
Thrilled to attend a very successful and long anticipated first board meeting of Pride in Place for West Lindsey. Building on the levelling up money I got from...
